Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class AppPreferences

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.AppPreferences
public class AppPreferences extends Object

Java class for AppPreferences complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AppPreferences">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableCustomizeMyTabs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableKeyboardShortcuts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableListViewHover" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableListViewReskin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableMultiMonitorComponents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enablePinTabs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableTabHover" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableTabLimits" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="saveUserSessions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
